title: taraxacum andorriense
intro: Taraxacum andorriense, also known as the Andorran dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus, Taraxacum. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, containing compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum andorriense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support liver function due to its antioxidant and detoxifying properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its roots can also be used as a coffee substitute, while its leaves are edible and can be used in salads or as a cooking green.
